/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libfake_tag_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libfake_tag_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/fake_tag_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/fake_tag_interfaces/msg/detail/tag_detection__description.c.o CMakeFiles/fake_tag_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/fake_tag_interfaces/msg/detail/tag_detection__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/fake_tag_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/fake_tag_interfaces/msg/detail/tag_detection__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/fake_tag_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/fake_tag_interfaces/msg/detail/tag_detection_array__description.c.o CMakeFiles/fake_tag_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/fake_tag_interfaces/msg/detail/tag_detection_array__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/fake_tag_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/fake_tag_interfaces/msg/detail/tag_detection_array__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
